text: By the [winds] scattering [dust], dispersing [it]
tl: Waz-zaariyaati zarwaa

text: And the [clouds] carrying a load [of water]
tl: Falhaamilaati wiqraa

text: And the ships sailing with ease
tl: Faljaariyaati yusraa

text: And the [angels] apportioning [each] matter,
tl: Falmuqassimaati amraa

text: Indeed, what you are promised is true.
tl: Innamaa too'adoona la-saadiq

text: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.
tl: Wa-innad deena la-waaqi'

text: By the heaven containing pathways,
tl: Wassamaaa'i zaatil hubuk

text: Indeed, you are in differing speech.
tl: Innakum lafee qawlim mukhtalif

text: Deluded away from it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is he who is deluded.
tl: Yu'faku 'anhu man ufik

text: Destroyed are the misinformers
tl: Qutilal kharraasoon

text: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.
tl: Allazeena hum fee ghamratin saahoon

text: They ask, \"When is the Day of Recompense?\"
tl: Yas'aloona ayyaana yawmud Deen

text: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire
tl: Yawma hum 'alan naari yuftanoon

text: [And will be told], \"Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient.\"
tl: Zooqoo fitnatakum haa-zal lazee kuntum bihee tas-ta'jiloon

text: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,
tl: Innal muttaqeena fee jannaatinw Wa-'uyoon

text: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.
tl: Aakhizeena maaa aataahum Rabbuhum; innahum kaanoo qabla zaalika muhsineen

text: They used to sleep but little of the night,
tl: kaanoo qaleelam minal laili maa yahja'oon

text: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,
tl: Wa-bilashaari hum yastaghfiroon

text: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.
tl: Wa-feee amwaalihim haqqul lissaaa'ili walmahroom

text: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
tl: Wa-fil ardi aayaatul lilmooqineen

text: And in yourselves. Then will you not see?
tl: Wa-feee anfusikum; afalaa tubsiroon

text: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.
tl: Wa-fis samaaa'i rizqukum Wa-maa too'adoon

text: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.
tl: Fawa-Rabbis samaaa'i wal-ardi innahoo lahaqqum misla maa annakum tantiqoon

text: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham? -
tl: Hal ataaka hadeesu daifi Ibraaheemal mukrameen

text: When they entered upon him and said, \"[We greet you with] peace.\" He answered, \"[And upon you] peace; [you are] a people unknown.\"
tl: Iz dakhaloo 'alaihi faqaaloo salaaman qaala salaamun qawmum munkaroon

text: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf.
tl: Faraagha ilaaa ahlihee fajaaa'a bi'ijlin sameen

text: And placed it near them; he said, \"Will you not eat?\"
tl: Faqarrabahooo ilaihim qaala alaa taakuloon

text: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, \"Fear not,\" and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.
tl: Fa-awjasa minhum khee-fatan qaaloo laa takhaf Wa-bashsharoohu bighulaamin 'aleem

text: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, \"[I am] a barren old woman!\"
tl: Fa-aqbalatim ra-atuhoo fee sarratin fasakkat wajhahaa Wa-qaalat 'ajoozun 'aqeem

text: They said, \"Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing.\"
tl: Qaaloo kazaaliki qaala Rabbuki innahoo huwal hakeemul 'aleem

text: [Abraham] said, \"Then what is your business [here], O messengers?\"
tl: Qaala famaa khatbukum ayyuhal mursaloon

text: They said, \"Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals
tl: Qaalooo innaaa ursilnaaa ilaa qawmim mujrimeen

text: To send down upon them stones of clay,
tl: Linursila 'alaihim hijaa-ratam min teen

text: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors.\"
tl: Musawwamatan 'inda rabbika lilmusrifeen

text: So We brought out whoever was in them [i.e., the cities] of the believers.
tl: Fa-akhrajnaa man kaana feehaa minal mu'mineen

text: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims.
tl: Famaa wajadnaa feehaa ghaira baitim minal muslimeen

text: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.
tl: Wa-taraknaa feehaaa aayatal lillazeena yakhaafoonal 'azaabal aleem

text: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority.
tl: Wa-fee Moosaaa iz arsalnaahu ilaa Fir'awna bisultaa-nim mubeen

text: But he turned away with his supporters and said, \"A magician or a madman.\"
tl: Fatawalla biruknihee Wa-qaala saahirun aw majnoon

text: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy.
tl: Fa-akhaznaahu Wa-junoo-dahoo fanabaznaahum fil yammi Wa-huwa muleem

text: And in ʿAad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind.
tl: Wa-fee 'Aadin iz arsalnaa 'alaihimur reehal 'aqeem

text: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.
tl: Maa tazaru min shai'in atat 'alaihi illaa ja'alat-hu karrameem

text: And in Thamūd, when it was said to them, \"Enjoy yourselves for a time.\"
tl: Wa-fee Samooda iz qeela lahum tamatta''oo hattaa heen

text: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.
tl: Fa'ataw 'an amri Rabbihim fa-akhazal-humus saa'iqatu Wa-hum yanzuroon

text: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.
tl: Famas tataa'oo min qiyaaminw Wa-maa kaanoo muntasireen

text: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient.
tl: Wa-qawma Noohim min qablu innahum kaano qawman faasiqeen

text: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander.
tl: Wassamaaa'a banainaa-haa bi-aydinw Wa-innaa lamoosi'oon

text: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.
tl: Wal-arda farashnaahaa fani'mal maahidoon

text: And of all things We created two mates [i.e., counterparts]; perhaps you will remember.
tl: Wa-min kulli shai'in khalaqnaa zawjaini la'allakum tazakkaroon

text: So flee to Allāh. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
tl: Fafirrooo ilal laahi innee lakum minhu nazeerum mubeen

text: And do not make [as equal] with Allāh another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
tl: Wa-laa taj'aloo ma'al laahi ilaahan aakhara innee lakum minhu nazeerum mubeen

text: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, \"A magician or a madman.\"
tl: Kazaalika maaa atal lazeena min qablihim mir Rasoolin illaa qaaloo saahirun aw majnoon

text: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people.
tl: Atawaasaw bih; bal hum qawmun taaghoon

text: So leave them, [O Muḥammad], for you are not to be blamed.
tl: Fatawalla 'anhum famaaa anta bimaloom

text: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.
tl: Wa-zakkir fa-innaz zikraa tanfa'ul mu'mineen

text: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
tl: Wa-maa khalaqtul jinna wal-insa illaa liya'budoon

text: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.
tl: Maaa ureedu minhum mir rizqinw Wa-maaa ureedu aien yut'imoon

text: Indeed, it is Allāh who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.
tl: Innal laaha Huwar Razzaaqu Zul Quwwatil Mateen

text: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their companions [i.e., predecessors], so let them not impatiently urge Me.
tl: Fa-inna lillazeena zalamoo zanoobam misla zanoobi ashaabihim falaa yasta'jiloon

text: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.
tl: Fawailul lillazeena kafaroo mien yawmihimul lazee yoo'adoon
